positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~activate(yuri)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    activate(p1)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    leap(p1)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    professional(p1)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~professional(X0) | can_jump(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    p1 != yuri).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~leap(X0) | activate(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~can_jump(X0) | leap(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    can_jump(p1)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define american(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    american(yuri)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    ~american(p1)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    activate(p1)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    leap(p1)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    p1 != yuri).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~can_jump(X0) | leap(X0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    professional(p1)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~professional(X0) | can_jump(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~activate(yuri)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~leap(X0) | activate(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    can_jump(p1)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
